item.title: Version 0.185.13
item.description:
What's New in 0.185.13

  • The docked panel now explains hover recording controls: pause, cancel, and resume while recording.
  • Stability and performance improvements.
  • The docked panel's info guide now explains how to pause, cancel, and resume recordings.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.185.12
item.description:
What's New in 0.185.12

  • App now confirms before switching between Simple and Advanced panel modes, with a "Don't ask again" option.
  • Docking Panel window and Control Center integration have been improved throughout.
  • Customize the look of your Control Center with new appearance options.
  • The compact Control Center layout now offers more quick-action choices.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.185.11
item.description:
What's New in 0.185.11

  • The docking panel timer now pauses correctly when you pause a recording.
  • Recordings panel has a cleaner layout with quick rewrite access and simplified tabs.
  • The docking panel now moves out of the way when you reveal an auto-hiding Dock.
  • Stability and interface improvements throughout the app.

item.title: Version 0.185.10
item.description:
What's New in 0.185.10

  • Recording Library has a refreshed, cleaner design that's easier to navigate.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.185.9
item.description:
What's New in 0.185.9

  • New AI Chat lets you have back-and-forth conversations directly in the app.
  • The audio waveform now stays visible as you work, not just while recording.
  • You can now send any transcription straight to Notes or Journal with one tap.
  • Menus have been reorganized for a cleaner, more consistent experience.
  • Improved sign-in reliability on iPhone and Apple Watch.

item.title: Version 0.185.8
item.description:
What's New in 0.185.8

  • Separate toggles now control the Recording Library and Transcript History independently.
  • "Advanced Mode" has been renamed to "Pro Tools" for clarity.
  • Fresh installs now start with the right default settings out of the box.
  • Stability and display improvements throughout the app.

item.title: Version 0.185.7
item.description:
What's New in 0.185.7

  • You can now save up to 3 local AI models, with a guided prompt to remove old ones when the limit is reached.
  • The Control Center header has improved spacing for a cleaner, more polished look.
  • Experimental settings are now grouped together for easier discovery.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.185.6
item.description:
What's New in 0.185.6

  • The app is now fully translated into 32 languages, including all onboarding and history screens.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.185.5
item.description:
What's New in 0.185.5

  • The app is now available in 37 languages, including onboarding and history.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.185.4
item.description:
What's New in 0.185.4

  • Clearer error messages when downloading a local AI model fails.
  • Improved accessibility throughout the app.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.185.3
item.description:
What's New in 0.185.3

  • Signing in with Apple now works reliably on all Macs, including Developer ID builds.
  • Onboarding flow is smoother with several display issues resolved.
  • The success screen after connecting your account now appears correctly.
  • Stability and security improvements across the app.

item.title: Version 0.185.2
item.description:
What's New in 0.185.2

  • Fixed an issue where the app would not launch correctly on some Macs after installation.

item.title: Version 0.185.1
item.description: What's New in 0.185.1

item.title: Version 0.184.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.184.0

  • Polished Control Center headers for a cleaner, more refined look.
  • Improved text and translations throughout the app for better clarity.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.183.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.183.0

  • New in-app help articles added for Journal, Library, Notes, Language, and Rewards settings.
  • The Coin Shop now includes a preview so you can see rewards before spending.
  • Improved text and translations throughout the app for better clarity.
  • General stability and polish improvements.

item.title: Version 0.182.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.182.0

  • New users can now try Ultra free for 15 days directly from the app.
  • A coin shop lets you redeem earned coins for rewards and upgrades.
  • Expanded help content across more settings sections for easier navigation.

item.title: Version 0.181.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.181.0

  • Simple Mode now shows only the 6 most essential items for a cleaner, focused experience.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.180.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.180.0

  • Improved translations and localized text across all settings and interface panels.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.178.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.178.0

  • Redesigned Appearance settings with a cleaner, more intuitive layout.
  • Collapsible sections now show helpful subtitles so you always know what's inside.
  • Coin Shop settings have been reorganized for easier navigation.
  • Viska Pass is now off by default for a simpler out-of-the-box experience.

item.title: Version 0.177.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.177.0

  • Removed the system stats widget for a cleaner, more focused experience.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.176.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.176.0

  • New system monitor widget shows live CPU, RAM, disk, and battery stats in your panel.
  • Appearance settings are now organized into collapsible sections for easier navigation.
  • Stability and performance improvements across the app.

item.title: Version 0.172.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.172.0

  • Customize your panel layout with new widget options for a personalized experience.
  • New Advanced Mode consolidates power-user settings in one place.
  • Widget defaults have been improved for a better out-of-the-box experience.

item.title: Version 0.171.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.171.0

  • New panel widgets let you control Viska without opening the main window.
  • Echo cancellation reduces microphone feedback for cleaner recordings.
  • Audio settings give you more control over input quality and processing.
  • Voice Mode settings have a cleaner, easier-to-navigate layout.
  • Stability and performance improvements across the app.

item.title: Version 0.169.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.169.0

  • Voice Mode settings have a refreshed, easier-to-navigate interface.
  • Wake word detection is more reliable with an improved underlying service.
  • Stability and performance improvements throughout the app.

item.title: Version 0.168.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.168.0

  • Wake word detection is now more reliable and responsive.
  • Voice mode interface has been refreshed with a cleaner, improved design.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.167.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.167.0

  • Voice command response is now faster and more reliable.
  • Wake word detection pipeline improved for better accuracy and audio quality.
  • Quick Text now pastes more consistently across apps.
  • Daily chest rewards and Shortcuts support enhanced.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.166.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.166.0

  • Wake word detection is now faster and more reliable.
  • Audio recording quality and stability have been improved.
  • Daily chest rewards offer more variety and better progression.
  • Shortcuts integration has been expanded with new actions.
  • Stability and performance improvements across the app.

item.title: Version 0.164.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.164.0

  • Daily Chest rewards have been improved with better variety and progression.
  • Shortcuts integration is now more reliable and responsive.
  • Stability improvements from removing outdated background services.

item.title: Version 0.163.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.163.0

  • Daily chest rewards now play satisfying sounds throughout the reveal experience.
  • Chest opening animations feel more polished with richer audio feedback.
  • Keyboard shortcuts configuration is now more reliably saved and restored.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.162.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.162.0

  • Wake word detection is now more reliable and responsive.
  • Audio streaming has been improved for smoother, more consistent recordings.
  • Fixed a crash that could occur when starting or stopping recordings.
  • The undo deletion notification has been restyled to better match the app's design.

item.title: Version 0.161.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.161.0

  • Undo deletion notification has been restyled to match the app's floating panel design.
  • Visual consistency and polish improvements throughout the app.

item.title: Version 0.160.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.160.0

  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.159.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.159.0

  • New scan overlay appears while OCR captures text from your screen.
  • Undo deletion notification now matches the scanning toast for a consistent look.

item.title: Version 0.158.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.158.0

  • Stability and performance improvements throughout the app.

item.title: Version 0.157.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.157.0

  • Browse and edit your progression roadmap to see upcoming rewards at every level.
  • Missions now match your subscription plan so you'll never see an unachievable challenge.
  • Fixed an issue where the Mission Builder would not open on macOS.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.156.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.156.0

  • Viska Pass is here — unlock missions, earn XP, and open chests with rarity-based rewards.
  • Chest reveals now play unique sound effects for each rarity tier.
  • Remote sync keeps your Viska Pass progress up to date across devices.
  • Administrators can now configure missions, loot, XP, and cosmetics in real time.
  • Device recognition expanded to cover 170+ Apple devices.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.155.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.155.0

  • Improved iCloud sync reliability and consistency across devices.
  • Settings now load faster and respond more reliably.
  • Stability and performance improvements throughout the app.

item.title: Version 0.154.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.154.0

  • Viska Pass screen has been redesigned with a refined layout and updated icons.
  • Daily Chest card features a new polished look with warm tones and a premium feel.
  • Reward module backgrounds now consistently reflect your active subscription tier.
  • Fixed an issue where wager payout amounts could display incorrectly.

item.title: Version 0.153.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.153.0

  • Complete daily and weekly Missions to earn coins and unlock exclusive rewards.
  • Collect coins and spend them in the new in-app shop to unlock items.
  • Earn decorations, titles, and other collectibles as you level up.
  • Free users can now access the Advanced mode toggle again in the control panel.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.152.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.152.0

  • Complete daily and weekly missions to earn XP and level up faster.
  • Unlock backgrounds, visualizers, idle animations, and themes as you progress.
  • Spend Lucky Coins in the new coin shop to unlock cosmetic items directly.
  • Earn coins from daily chests and optional streak wagers for bonus payouts.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.151.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.151.0

  • Viska now appears correctly in Launchpad and the Dock.
  • App is now fully translated into 31 languages with improved translation accuracy.
  • Recorder panel and general UI polish improvements.

item.title: Version 0.150.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.150.0

  • Daily Chest rewards now vary by subscription tier, with a pity timer so you always get something good.
  • Streak shields protect your daily streak when you miss a day.
  • All users earn rewards when leveling up, regardless of tier.
  • Stability improvements and fixes for subscription status updates.
  • General bug fixes and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.149.2
item.description:
What's New in 0.149.2

  • Stability and performance improvements under the hood.
  • Build reliability and update delivery enhancements.

item.title: Version 0.148.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.148.0

  • Fixed a crash that could occur at startup when syncing your data with iCloud.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.145.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.145.0

  • Introducing Viska Pass — earn XP, level up through 25 levels, and unlock cosmetic rewards.
  • Daily Chest rewards give you something to open every day you use Viska.
  • Level up to unlock new avatar, sticker, flag, and typography customizations.
  • Voice mode indicators and recording controls have been redesigned for clarity.
  • Quick OCR now has a Direct Copy mode that skips the results screen entirely.
  • Stability and performance improvements across the app.

item.title: Version 0.147.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.147.0

  • Fixed a crash that could occur on startup in rare cases.

item.title: Version 0.146.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.146.0

  • Subscription plan limits are now correctly enforced via keyboard shortcuts, Stream Deck, and URL actions.
  • Improved reliability and accuracy of the transcription pipeline.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.142.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.142.0

  • Stability and performance improvements.
  • Fixed a layout issue in the compact Control Center panel.

item.title: Version 0.139.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.139.0

  • Browse and install local AI models directly from a new in-app model browser.
  • Choose your preferred local transcription model from the new Settings pane.
  • Stability and performance improvements across the app.

item.title: Version 0.138.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.138.0

  • Improved layout and visual consistency in the Control Center menu.
  • Your settings and preferences are now saved and restored more reliably.
  • Stability and performance improvements to the floating panel.

item.title: Version 0.137.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.137.0

  • Redesigned Settings for a cleaner, more organized experience.
  • New panel size customization options in Appearance settings.
  • Improved compact Control Center layout with refined row modes.
  • Updated translations across all supported languages.

item.title: Version 0.136.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.136.0

  • Your subscription status now syncs reliably across all your devices.
  • Fixed an issue where subscription changes could take time to appear on other devices.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.134.0
item.description: What's New in 0.134.0

item.title: Version 0.131.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.131.0

  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.130.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.130.0

  • Improved security for subscription verification and account protection.
  • Stability and reliability improvements.

item.title: Version 0.129.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.129.0

  • Your subscription status now syncs faster and more reliably across devices.
  • Account information stays up to date automatically in the background.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.127.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.127.0

  • Updated contact information and legal documents for accuracy.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.125.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.125.0

  • Added safeguards to prevent unexpected charges when using AI-powered features.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.124.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.124.0

  • Transcript view is cleaner and easier to read.
  • Settings window is more reliable to move and resize.
  • Onboarding now correctly shows your subscription tier.
  • Compact panel no longer appears too large on first launch.
  • Recording no longer plays the completion sound twice.

item.title: Version 0.123.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.123.0

  • Subscription settings now show your plan, start date, and renewal or cancellation date clearly.
  • Promotional discount codes are now displayed directly in the upgrade screen with savings breakdown.
  • Upgrading to Ultra now includes a feature overview popover so you can see what you get before subscribing.
  • Stability and settings improvements.

item.title: Version 0.122.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.122.0

  • Redesigned Floating Panel with a modern Liquid Glass look and feel.
  • Liquid Glass design now applied to Assistant, Voice Map, Stream Deck, and Reports.
  • Promo codes screen updated with refreshed styling and smoother interactions.
  • Onboarding flow polished with consistent icons and improved layout.
  • Fixed an issue where some Pro and Ultra features could be incorrectly accessed.
  • Stability and visual improvements across menus, labels, and compact controls.

item.title: Version 0.121.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.121.0

  • Settings labels and descriptions are now fully translated into your language.
  • Fixed an issue where local AI model downloads could stall or fail.

item.title: Version 0.120.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.120.0

  • Local speech model downloads are now significantly faster and more reliable.
  • Feature availability is now shown consistently throughout Settings and the Control Center.

item.title: Version 0.119.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.119.0

  • Swedish KB-Whisper transcription models are now available and featured in the model browser.
  • Downloading local models is now more reliable, with improved handling for large files.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.118.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.118.0

  • Browse and download local AI models directly from within the app.
  • Added support for more languages when using local speech recognition.
  • New translations added for additional interface languages.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.115.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.115.0

  • Improved app experience in 32 languages with expanded translations.
  • Subscription plan features are now more clearly presented and organized.
  • Settings panels for appearance, OCR, and reports are more polished.
  • Stability and interface improvements throughout the app.

item.title: Version 0.114.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.114.0

  • Subscriptions are now simpler and easier to manage.
  • Translation has been improved for better accuracy and reliability.
  • Menu bar activity animation is now smoother and less distracting.

item.title: Version 0.113.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.113.0

  • The menu bar icon now smoothly pulses in red while recording, instead of blinking.
  • General stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.112.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.112.0

  • Improved app update reliability with a streamlined update process.
  • Faster app startup with a simplified initialization flow.
  • Updated Terms of Service documentation.

item.title: Version 0.111.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.111.0

  • Updated Terms of Service and Privacy Policy with clearer, more transparent language.
  • Improved the automatic update process for a smoother experience.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.110.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.110.0

  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.109.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.109.0

  • Improved the About window with a cleaner, more polished layout.
  • Compliance and legal information updated to meet latest requirements.
  • General stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.108.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.108.0

  • Settings and menus now correctly say "iCloud" instead of "CloudKit" throughout the app.
  • Improved the preset editor for a smoother editing experience.
  • Updated translations and text across all supported languages.

item.title: Version 0.107.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.107.0

  • "Screenshot OCR" has been renamed to "OCR" in the Control Center for clarity.
  • Improved how features unlock across subscription tiers for a more consistent experience.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.106.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.106.0

  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.105.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.105.0

  • Improved the floating panel layout for a cleaner, more polished appearance.
  • Fixed onboarding screen spacing and layout for a smoother first-time setup experience.

item.title: Version 0.104.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.104.0

  • Improved onboarding experience with a cleaner, more intuitive setup flow.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.103.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.103.0

  • Annual subscribers now receive gift codes to share with friends for free Pro access.
  • Active launch promotions are displayed with exact savings and expiration dates.
  • Yearly subscription options now show total value including discounts and gift codes.
  • Account settings pane has a cleaner layout with improved subscription overview.

item.title: Version 0.102.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.102.0

  • Improved the Text Scanner with clearer icons, a help guide, and easier access to settings.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.101.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.101.0

  • OCR scans are now saved to history so you can review and reuse them later.
  • New dedicated settings tab for Annotate OCR — configure it in one place.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.100.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.100.0

  • General stability and performance improvements under the hood.

item.title: Version 0.99.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.99.0

  • Subscription settings have been redesigned for a cleaner, easier-to-navigate experience.
  • File References, Task Pipeline, and Quick Text are now part of the Ultra plan.
  • Translation is now an Ultra-exclusive feature.
  • Smart Triggers are now available on all plans with no limits.

item.title: Version 0.98.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.98.0

  • The Control Center info panel now shows all available features, including footer actions.
  • Cleaner floating panel title bar with fewer status icons for a tidier look.

item.title: Version 0.97.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.97.0

  • Special pricing and limited-time offers now appear automatically in the upgrade screen.
  • Discounted prices update in real time when promotions are active.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.96.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.96.0

  • Completely redesigned Settings with a cleaner, easier-to-navigate layout.
  • Voice preview button is now easier to find, placed directly next to the voice selector.
  • Cleaner Control Center footer with a less cluttered appearance.
  • General stability and interface improvements.

item.title: Version 0.95.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.95.0

  • Run AI processing entirely on your Mac with new local model support.
  • Updates now install faster and more reliably in the background.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.94.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.94.0

  • Run transcription entirely on your Mac — no internet required with local AI models.
  • Browse, download, and switch between local models directly from the menu bar.
  • Automatic updates now deliver faster with a streamlined release pipeline.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.93.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.93.0

  • Say "Quick Text" to instantly type a short note without full transcription mode.
  • All features are now available to every user, regardless of subscription tier.
  • Voice command list is now collapsible, keeping the interface clean and focused.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.92.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.92.0

  • Active feature icons now highlight which post-task actions are currently enabled at a glance.
  • Improved layout and controls in the Task Pipeline for a smoother workflow.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.91.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.91.0

  • You can now set up a custom sequence of actions to run automatically after each transcription.
  • File references now open reliably and always show the correct number of attached files.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.89.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.89.0

  • Attach file paths to your transcriptions with the new File References feature.
  • Improved onboarding with new toggles, info modals, and smoother animations.
  • Updated subscription options and branding across the app.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.88.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.88.0

  • New rate limit notification lets you know when you're approaching your usage limit.
  • Improved onboarding experience makes getting started faster and clearer.
  • Text-to-speech playback is smoother and more reliable.
  • Faster app updates and resource loading in the background.

item.title: Version 0.87.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.87.0

  • Control Center row modes updated for a cleaner, more consistent layout.
  • Local speech recognition model now loads reliably after a recent startup fix.
  • Advanced Transcription settings removed to simplify and streamline preferences.

item.title: Version 0.86.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.86.0

  • Fixed an issue where the local Kyutai speech model failed to load correctly.
  • Improved reliability of the real-time streaming transcription toggle.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.84.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.84.0

  • Updated Stream Deck plugin to version 1.6.0 with improved reliability and compatibility.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.83.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.83.0

  • Stream Deck integration is now available to all users, no subscription required.
  • Text-to-speech now works consistently across all dictation modes.
  • Voice output quality and behavior has been improved throughout the app.
  • The app is now available in more languages with refined translations.
  • Fixed a crash that could occur when using the Stream Deck plugin.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.81.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.81.0

  • New local transcription engine (Kyutai) for faster, more private voice-to-text on your Mac.
  • Cloned voice audio quality significantly improved with clearer, more natural playback.
  • Annotations and custom prompts are now available to all users, no subscription required.
  • Wake words updated with better defaults for more reliable voice activation.
  • AI Mode is now hidden when using local-only mode, reducing interface clutter.
  • Stability and interface improvements across settings, onboarding, and theme handling.

item.title: Version 0.80.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.80.0

  • Improved text-to-speech with better voice quality and reliability.
  • New visual effects powered by Metal shaders for a smoother experience.
  • Settings interface reorganized for easier navigation.
  • Stability and performance improvements throughout the app.

item.title: Version 0.79.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.79.0

  • Clone your own voice for a personalized text-to-speech experience.
  • New spectrum visualizer displays a live audio waveform while recording.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.78.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.78.0

  • Improved account management tools for faster support and issue resolution.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.77.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.77.0

  • Settings are now organized into clear, logical sections for easier navigation.
  • Text-to-speech support added — have Viska read your transcriptions aloud.
  • Subscription management has been updated with improved clarity and options.
  • Stability and performance improvements throughout the app.

item.title: Version 0.76.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.76.0

  • Improved text-to-speech with updated voice services for smoother, more natural playback.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.75.0
item.description: What's New in 0.75.0

item.title: Version 0.74.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.74.0

  • Live transcription now appears faster with no ghost text while you type.
  • Recording controls have a refreshed, cleaner look.
  • Subscription screen has been updated with a new design.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.73.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.73.0

  • Read Aloud is now accessible directly from the toolbar for faster access.
  • Improved memory handling for Read Aloud, reducing resource usage over time.
  • Settings interface has been polished with a cleaner, more consistent look.
  • Gift code activation is now more reliable for subscription upgrades.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.72.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.72.0

  • Transcription now streams in real time as you speak, so you see results instantly.
  • Copy transcriptions directly to your clipboard with one click.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.71.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.71.0

  • New settings panel makes it easier to manage and switch between local AI models.
  • Recorder panel controls are more polished with improved hover and interaction feedback.
  • Pin button now supports three states: unpinned, pinned, and position-locked.
  • Backend toggle lets you switch between cloud and local transcription directly from the recorder.
  • Stability and performance improvements throughout.

item.title: Version 0.70.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.70.0

  • New text-to-speech settings let you customize voice, speed, and playback behavior.
  • Recording reliability and performance have been improved.

item.title: Version 0.69.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.69.0

  • New preset editor lets you create and customize AI presets in a clean two-column layout.
  • Text-to-speech support added so Viska can read your transcriptions aloud.
  • Transparent panel mode now works correctly across all panel sizes.
  • Simple Mode now shows output and AI rows for a more complete experience.
  • Settings and appearance polish with various visual improvements throughout.

item.title: Version 0.68.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.68.0

  • Pause and resume recordings directly from the floating recorder panel.
  • Stop or cancel a paused recording using the new control buttons.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.67.0
item.description: What's New in 0.67.0

item.title: Version 0.65.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.65.0

  • New voices added: choose from FluidAudio text-to-speech engines for natural-sounding playback.
  • Speech recognition now starts faster with streaming transcription support.
  • Viska can now detect when you stop speaking and respond more naturally.
  • Speaker identification lets you see who said what in multi-person recordings.
  • A compact audio visualizer now appears inline while text-to-speech plays.

item.title: Version 0.64.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.64.0

  • Cloud translation is now available to all users, with limits based on your plan.
  • Nordic languages added: Swedish, Danish, Norwegian, and Finnish for translation.
  • Local AI model cards now show RAM requirements and device compatibility.
  • Local storage size display is more accurate, including text-to-speech models.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.63.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.63.0

  • Select and delete multiple notes or reports at once with the new bulk delete feature.
  • Improved accuracy when transcribing Swedish speech using the local AI model.
  • Enhanced local AI performance and reliability.

item.title: Version 0.62.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.62.0

  • Local AI transcription is faster and more reliable.
  • Swedish language detection now works correctly with on-device transcription.
  • The Settings language picker displays properly across all screen sizes.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.61.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.61.0

  • Local AI transcription now shows accurate download progress and model details.
  • WhisperKit language selection works correctly across all supported languages.
  • Stability improvements and bug fixes.

item.title: Version 0.60.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.60.0

  • Fixed a crash that could occur when closing or animating windows.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.59.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.59.0

  • The Control Center panel can now be resized to fit your preferred workflow.
  • Layout and spacing throughout the Control Center have been refined for a cleaner look.
  • Stability and visual polish improvements.

item.title: Version 0.58.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.58.0

  • The Control Center window can now be freely resized to fit your workflow.
  • Compact mode includes improved layout polish for a cleaner look.
  • Stability and performance improvements under the hood.

item.title: Version 0.57.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.57.0

  • Control Center now resizes smoothly as content changes.
  • Karaoke-style transcription text is better spaced and easier to read.
  • Settings panels look and feel more polished throughout.
  • Stability and performance improvements under the hood.

item.title: Version 0.56.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.56.0

  • Transcription settings have been redesigned with a cleaner, easier-to-navigate layout.
  • Voice downloads no longer get stuck at 99% — they complete correctly now.
  • Gift codes are now activated more reliably when first redeemed.
  • The Control Center window can now be resized to fit your workflow.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.55.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.55.0

  • Gift codes: redeem a code to unlock Viska Pro or Ultra access.
  • Stability and performance improvements across the app.

item.title: Version 0.54.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.54.0

  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.50.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.50.0

  • New onboarding guide helps you discover output modes, backends, and privacy features at a glance.
  • Upgrade screen now includes a monthly/yearly billing toggle for easy plan comparison.
  • Pro and Ultra feature cards are clearer, making it easier to choose the right plan.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.48.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.48.0

  • New Appearance settings let you customize the visualizer style, colors, and window behavior.
  • Choose from 4 waveform styles, 10 idle animations, and 8 color themes for the recorder.
  • Text-to-speech now includes speed controls and automatic language detection.
  • The app interface is now available in 32 languages.
  • Fixed several text-to-speech reliability and audio playback issues.

item.title: Version 0.47.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.47.0

  • New onboarding experience to help you get started quickly.
  • The app window is now resizable to fit your workflow.
  • Language support now covers 32 languages.
  • Various improvements to subscription setup and billing options.

item.title: Version 0.46.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.46.0

  • New onboarding experience makes getting started with Viska faster and clearer.
  • Check the app for current promotions and discounts on subscriptions.
  • Updated feature overview clearly shows what's included in each plan.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.44.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.44.0

  • Labels updated throughout the app — "Notes" replaces "Task," "Pro" replaces "Professional."
  • Simplified the app by removing an unused mode option.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.43.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.43.0

  • Modes now play a sound when you switch between RAW, FLOW, CLARITY, and other transcription modes.
  • Command mode is now available in the Control Center for quicker access to voice commands.
  • Local model selection is now available directly in the floating panel.
  • Voice Mode is now gated by subscription tier, with a new info modal explaining available features.
  • Security and stability improvements across the app.

item.title: Version 0.42.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.42.0

  • Added audio feedback when switching between AI modes.
  • Command mode now remains visible in the Control Center.
  • Recording panel now remembers its own AI mode settings independently.
  • Subscription settings now display a refreshed Pro tier interface.
  • Notes are now protected from accidental cloud sync overwrite.
  • General stability and text-to-speech improvements.

item.title: Version 0.41.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.41.0

  • Improved layout of report pickers for easier reading and selection.
  • Refreshed Pro tier interface with a cleaner, more polished look.
  • Fixed several text-to-speech issues for smoother audio playback.
  • Stability and performance improvements throughout the app.

item.title: Version 0.40.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.40.0

  • New IP Address widget lets you quickly view your local network address.
  • Clock and system monitor widgets now display correctly in preview.
  • Reduced app size by removing an unused audio library.

item.title: Version 0.39.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.39.0

  • The text-to-speech controls have a cleaner, more polished look and feel.
  • The notes editor toolbar is reorganized for easier access to common actions.
  • Voice commands are more reliable and responsive.

item.title: Version 0.38.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.38.0

  • New: Listen to your notes read aloud with a tap, using natural-sounding voices.
  • Choose between your Mac's built-in voices or a downloadable local AI voice engine.
  • Adjust read-aloud speed — slow, normal, or fast — to match your pace.
  • Voice commands are now shorter and more natural; no need to say "Viska" for every action.
  • The Reports editor toolbar is cleaner and easier to navigate.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.37.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.37.0

  • Viska can now read your transcriptions aloud using Text-to-Speech.
  • Choose between local on-device voices or your system's built-in voices.
  • Configure your preferred voice directly from the app settings.

item.title: Version 0.36.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.36.0

  • Settings rows now highlight on hover, making navigation clearer and more responsive.
  • General stability and polish improvements.

item.title: Version 0.35.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.35.0

  • Reorganized the Reports editor toolbar for a cleaner, more intuitive layout.
  • Improved voice commands with better reliability and responsiveness.
  • Refreshed the Settings interface for easier navigation.
  • Fixed text color in the Reports editor for better readability.

item.title: Version 0.34.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.34.0

  • Voice Mode no longer freezes during active sessions.
  • The floating panel is more stable and responsive.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.33.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.33.0

  • Fixed a freeze that could occur when using Voice Mode during transcription.
  • Improved floating panel stability and reliability.

item.title: Version 0.32.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.32.0

  • Voice Mode no longer freezes when activating or stopping transcription.
  • The floating panel is more stable and reliable during use.

item.title: Version 0.31.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.31.0

  • Improved stability of the floating panel for a smoother, more reliable experience.
  • General stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.30.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.30.0

  • Improved stability and reliability of the floating panel.
  • General performance and code quality improvements under the hood.

item.title: Version 0.29.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.29.0

  • Reports editor now supports text color, highlighting, and undo/redo for easier editing.
  • Word-by-word playback highlighting now stays accurately in sync with the audio.
  • Selecting multiple items in your Library works correctly again.
  • Offline mode now clearly indicates when AI reformatting requires Apple Intelligence.
  • Stability and performance improvements throughout the app.

item.title: Version 0.28.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.28.0

  • Word-by-word highlighting during transcription playback is now accurate and reliable.
  • Selecting multiple items in the Library works correctly again.
  • Reports view includes layout and usability improvements.
  • The floating panel has been refined for a smoother experience.
  • Stability and reliability improvements under the hood.

item.title: Version 0.27.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.27.0

  • Record audio directly from the Reports window.
  • Rename reports inline without opening a separate dialog.
  • Pick your preferred AI model right from the Reports view.

item.title: Version 0.26.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.26.0

  • Record audio directly from the Reports window for faster report creation.
  • Rename reports inline without opening a separate dialog.
  • Choose which AI model to use when generating reports.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.25.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.25.0

  • Record audio directly from the Reports window for faster transcription workflows.
  • Rename reports inline without leaving the window.
  • Apply AI formatting to any selected text within a report.
  • Manage variables directly inside the Reports window.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.24.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.24.0

  • New: Create professional reports from your transcriptions using built-in AI templates.
  • Reports sync automatically across your devices via iCloud.
  • Choose from multiple report styles to fit your workflow and content type.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.23.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.23.0

  • New: Professional Reports — create polished documents from your recordings using AI-powered templates.
  • Reports sync across your devices automatically via iCloud.
  • Export reports to share or archive them outside the app.
  • Use voice commands while recording without stopping your dictation.
  • Chain multiple voice commands together in a single spoken phrase.

item.title: Version 0.22.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.22.0

  • Use voice commands while recording is in progress, without stopping.
  • Issue multiple voice commands in a single phrase for faster control.
  • Subscription plan benefits are now clearer and easier to understand.
  • Triggers settings have a simpler, cleaner layout.
  • Stability improvements and minor bug fixes for voice mode.

item.title: Version 0.21.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.21.0

  • Voice commands now work reliably while a recording is in progress.
  • Fixed an issue where the floating panel could appear behind other windows.
  • Settings interface has been cleaned up for a more polished experience.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.20.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.20.0

  • Wake word "stop" command now reliably ends recording every time.
  • Dictation is more accurate and consistent across sessions.
  • Fixed the floating panel overlapping other windows unexpectedly.
  • App updates now download and install correctly.

item.title: Version 0.19.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.19.0

  • Wake word detection is now more reliable and responds correctly to stop commands.
  • Dictation mode has been improved for smoother, more accurate voice input.
  • Fixed an issue where the floating panel could overlap other windows unexpectedly.
  • Quick actions in the floating panel are easier to access and use.
  • Visual dividers in the Control Center now better separate sections for clarity.

item.title: Version 0.18.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.18.0

  • You can now customize quick actions to match your personal workflow.
  • Wake word detection is more reliable and responds consistently.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.17.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.17.0

  • Say "Hey Viska" more reliably — wake word detection now handles all languages and regions correctly.
  • New voice commands added for more hands-free control of the app.
  • Wake word detection recovers faster when the audio pipeline has a hiccup.
  • Minor visual tweaks to the floating recorder panel for a cleaner look.

item.title: Version 0.16.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.16.0

  • More voice commands available — control the app hands-free with new spoken shortcuts.
  • "Hey Viska" wake word detection is now more reliable and responsive.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.15.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.15.0

  • "Hey Viska" wake word detection is now more reliable and handles more speech variations.
  • The recording panel now shows clear color-coded status icons so you always know what the app is doing.
  • Voice commands now cover more settings — switch AI mode, output style, and more by speaking.
  • Silence detection automatically kicks in after a wake word trigger, so recording stops when you finish speaking.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.14.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.14.0

  • "Hey Viska" now activates more reliably with consistent wake word detection across all system languages.
  • Visual status indicators clearly show when Viska is listening, recording, or dictating.
  • Voice command settings are cleaner and easier to understand at a glance.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.13.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.13.0

  • Say "Hey Viska" to start recording hands-free, without touching your keyboard.
  • New voice commands let you control the app entirely with your voice.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.12.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.12.0

  • Say "Hey Viska" to start recording hands-free — no clicking required.
  • Use your voice to control the app: start, stop, or cancel recordings naturally.
  • New visual feedback shows when Viska is listening or transcribing.
  • Wake word detection works even when the app is in the background.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.10.0
item.description: What's New in 0.10.0

item.title: Version 0.9.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.9.0

  • New sections added to the Control Center info panel for quicker access to key details.
  • The Conversation toggle can now always be shown, regardless of other settings.
  • Improved AI prompt names for better clarity and consistency.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.8.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.8.0

  • Push-to-Talk keyboard shortcuts now work correctly after a recent regression.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.7.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.7.0

  • Connect Viska to OpenClaw and chat with an AI assistant directly from your menu bar.
  • AI responses can be read aloud automatically during OpenClaw conversations.
  • OpenClaw connection token syncs across your Macs via iCloud — no manual setup needed.
  • New onboarding step lets you test your microphone and set your hotkeys before you start.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.6.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.6.0

  • Notes and Journal sidebars are now resizable — drag to adjust the width to your liking.
  • Add new journal entries directly from the calendar header with the new + button.
  • Notes search bar now includes a quick-add button for faster note creation.
  • Cloud sync now fetches your latest data immediately when the app launches.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.5.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.5.0

  • Customize up to 4 Quick Actions in the Control Center for one-tap access to your favorite features.
  • Presets now save per-preset settings for Translation, Conversation Mode, Date Context, and Build & Verify.
  • Notes and Journal sidebars are now resizable — drag to your preferred width.
  • A subtle usage gauge appears when you're approaching your weekly limit.
  • Expanded in-app help for the Screenshot Gallery with tips on filtering, sorting, and sharing.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.4.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.4.0

  • Chat with an AI assistant directly inside Viska using the new built-in AI chat.
  • Send any transcription straight to your Notion workspace with one click.
  • Control Viska hands-free with six new Apple Shortcuts actions.
  • Format selected text from any app via the new Viska option in the macOS Services menu.
  • The record button in compact Control Center is now wider and easier to click.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.2.1
item.description:
What's New in 0.2.1

  • Chat with an AI assistant directly inside Viska using the new built-in AI chat feature.
  • AI chat now opens in a dedicated window instead of a floating panel.
  • The record button in compact Control Center is now wider and easier to click.
  • Stability and performance improvements.

item.title: Version 0.2.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.2.0

  • iCloud sync is now reliable — your transcriptions and data sync correctly across all your devices.
  • The app is now fully translated in 31 languages, with no missing or broken text.
  • Stability and performance improvements throughout the app.

item.title: Version 0.1.3
item.description:
What's New in 0.1.3

  • Control Center can now stay on top of other windows with the new Always on Top option.
  • Long-pressing dials and buttons in Control Center now triggers quick secondary actions.
  • AI mode indicators now use clean icons instead of text badges throughout the app.
  • Settings are better organized with improved grouping, layout, and icon consistency.
  • Stability and visual polish improvements across the app.

item.title: Version 0.1.2
item.description:
What's New in 0.1.2

  • Device model icons now appear in filter menus for easier browsing.
  • Transcription history now tracks which device each recording was made on.
  • Control Center header buttons auto-hide to keep the interface clean and focused.
  • General UI polish and stability improvements.

item.title: Version 0.1.1
item.description:
What's New in 0.1.1

  • Your transcription history now shows which device was used to make each recording.
  • Visual polish and layout refinements throughout the app for a cleaner look.
  • General stability and performance improvements.
